---
title: "preliminary_summary"
author: "matemba_"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: word_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r packages}
if (!require("pacman")) install.packages("pacman")

pacman::p_load(
  tidyverse,
  readr,
  dplyr,
  stringr,
  lubridate,
  labelled,
  janitor,
  gtsummary,
  haven,
  anthro,
  logbin,
  purrr,
  broom,
  psych,
  car,
  glmnet,
  vcd,
  nortest,
  olsrr,
  MASS,
  VIM,
  naniar,
  scales,
  flextable,
)
```

```{r paths}
root_dir <- file.path(
  "C:", "Users", "New", "Documents", "GitHub",
  "cosecsa_surgical_audits"
)
data_dir <- file.path(root_dir, "data")
raw_dir <- file.path(data_dir, "raw")

raw_path <- file.path(
  raw_dir,
  "SurgicalAuditInECSAR_DATA_LABELS_2026-04-27_1708.csv"
)

raw <- readr::read_csv(
  raw_path,
  show_col_types = FALSE,
  name_repair = "unique"
) %>%
  janitor::clean_names()

write.csv(raw, file.path(data_dir, "raw", "raw.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

raw_1 <- read_dta(
  file.path(data_dir, "raw", "raw_1.dta"),
) %>%
  janitor::clean_names()
```

```{r}
colnames_df <- tibble::tibble(variable = names(raw_1))


var_label <- tibble(
  variable = names(raw_1),
  label = map_chr(
    names(raw_1),
    ~ {
      lab <- var_label(raw_1[[.x]])
      if (is.null(lab) || length(lab) == 0) NA_character_ else as.character(lab)
    }
  ),
  class = map_chr(raw_1, ~ paste(class(.x), collapse = ", "))
)
```

```{r summary}
data_1 <- raw_1 %>% 
  dplyr::select(study_id_1, data_access_group, age_at_time_of_surgery_months_ye, gender_of_the_patient, patients_weight_kg, patients_height_in_meters, hb_level_g_d_l_immediate_before, facilities_visited_prior, date_of_surgery, mode_of_surgical_payment, age_group, type_of_surgery_adults, type_of_surgery_performed_adult, types_of_surgery_paediatrics, type_of_surgery_performed_paedia, did_the_patient_have_any_of_thes, urgency_of_operation, asa_physical_status_score, was_prophylactic_antibiotics_giv, please_approximate_the_timing_of, preoperative_fasting, senior_surgeon, senior_anaesthiologist, surgical_field_preparation, anaesthesia_type_used_select_all, were_minimal_invasive_procedures, what_was_the_class_of_the_wound, was_intraoperative_antibiotics_p, was_the_patient_given_intra_oper, indication_for_the_surgical_proc, trauma_injuries_and_orthopedic, acute_abdominal_conditions, cancers_and_tumors, urological_conditions, thoracic_conditions, neurosurgery, neonatal_and_infant_conditions, what_was_the_patients_dispositio, did_the_patient_require_nasogast, post_operative_complications_cla, complication_severity_grading, did_the_patient_develop_post_ope, if_yes_which_type_of_ssi, was_the_patient_alive_at_30_days, cause_of_death_107, v109, self_care_activities_bathing_sho, mobility_activities_getting_in_a, household_management_activities, social_and_leisure_activities_pa
         )


var_label_data1 <- tibble(
  variable = names(data_1),
  label = map_chr(
    names(data_1),
    ~ {
      lab <- var_label(data_1[[.x]])
      if (is.null(lab) || length(lab) == 0) NA_character_ else as.character(lab)
    }
  ),
  class = map_chr(data_1, ~ paste(class(.x), collapse = ", "))
)

write.csv(var_label_data1, file.path(data_dir, "processed", "var_label_data1.csv"), row.names = FALSE)


data_2 <- data_1 %>%
  rename(
    study_id = study_id_1,
    site = data_access_group,
    age = age_at_time_of_surgery_months_ye,
    sex = gender_of_the_patient,
    weight_kg = patients_weight_kg,
    height_m = patients_height_in_meters,
    hb_gdl = hb_level_g_d_l_immediate_before,
    facilities_visited_prior = facilities_visited_prior,
    date_of_surgery = date_of_surgery,
    mode_of_surgical_payment = mode_of_surgical_payment,
    age_group = age_group,
    type_of_surgery_adults = type_of_surgery_adults,
    type_of_surgery_performed_adult = type_of_surgery_performed_adult,
    types_of_surgery_paediatrics = types_of_surgery_paediatrics,
    type_of_surgery_performed_paedia = type_of_surgery_performed_paedia,
    chronic_condition = did_the_patient_have_any_of_thes,
    urgency_of_operation = urgency_of_operation,
    asa_physical_status_score = asa_physical_status_score,
    prophylactic_antibiotics_given = was_prophylactic_antibiotics_giv,
    timing_of_p_antibiotic = please_approximate_the_timing_of,
    preoperative_fasting = preoperative_fasting,
    senior_surgeon = senior_surgeon,
    senior_anaesthiologist = senior_anaesthiologist,
    surgical_field_preparation = surgical_field_preparation,
    anaesthesia_type = anaesthesia_type_used_select_all,
    minimal_invasive_procd_used = were_minimal_invasive_procedures,
    wound_class = what_was_the_class_of_the_wound,
    intraoperative_antibiotics = was_intraoperative_antibiotics_p,
    intra_oper_transfussion = was_the_patient_given_intra_oper,
    indication_surgical_procd = indication_for_the_surgical_proc,
    trauma_injuries_and_orthopedic = trauma_injuries_and_orthopedic,
    acute_abdominal_conditions = acute_abdominal_conditions,
    cancers_and_tumors = cancers_and_tumors,
    urological_conditions = urological_conditions,
    thoracic_conditions = thoracic_conditions,
    neurosurgery = neurosurgery,
    neonatal_and_infant_conditions = neonatal_and_infant_conditions,
    disposition_after_surg = what_was_the_patients_dispositio,
    require_nasogastric_tube = did_the_patient_require_nasogast,
    clavien_dindo_classification = post_operative_complications_cla,
    complication_severity_grading = complication_severity_grading,
    post_surg_infection = did_the_patient_develop_post_ope,
    if_yes_which_type_of_ssi = if_yes_which_type_of_ssi,
    alive_at_30_days = was_the_patient_alive_at_30_days,
    cause_of_death = cause_of_death_107,
    return_to_theatre = v109,
    self_care_activities = self_care_activities_bathing_sho,
    mobility_activities = mobility_activities_getting_in_a,
    household_management_activities = household_management_activities,
    social_and_leisure_activitie = social_and_leisure_activities_pa
  )

```

```{r}
data_2 <- data_2 %>%
  mutate(
    # Date variable
    date_of_surgery = parse_date_time(
      date_of_surgery,
      orders = c("ymd", "dmy", "mdy", "dmy HMS", "ymd HMS", "mdy HMS")
    ) %>% as_date(),
    # Numerical variables
    across(
      c(age, weight_kg, height_m, hb_gdl, facilities_visited_prior),
      ~ parse_number(as.character(.x))
    ),
    # Categorical variables
    across(
      c(
        site, sex, mode_of_surgical_payment, age_group,
        type_of_surgery_adults, type_of_surgery_performed_adult,
        types_of_surgery_paediatrics, type_of_surgery_performed_paedia,
        chronic_condition, urgency_of_operation, asa_physical_status_score,
        prophylactic_antibiotics_given, timing_of_p_antibiotic,
        preoperative_fasting, senior_surgeon, senior_anaesthiologist,
        surgical_field_preparation, anaesthesia_type,
        minimal_invasive_procd_used, wound_class,
        intraoperative_antibiotics, intra_oper_transfussion,
        indication_surgical_procd, trauma_injuries_and_orthopedic,
        acute_abdominal_conditions, cancers_and_tumors,
        urological_conditions, thoracic_conditions, neurosurgery,
        neonatal_and_infant_conditions, disposition_after_surg,
        require_nasogastric_tube, clavien_dindo_classification,
        complication_severity_grading, post_surg_infection,
        if_yes_which_type_of_ssi, alive_at_30_days, cause_of_death,
        return_to_theatre, self_care_activities, mobility_activities,
        household_management_activities, social_and_leisure_activitie
      ),
      ~ as.factor(str_squish(as.character(.x)))
    )
  )

glimpse(data_2)

summary(data_2$age)
summary(data_2$weight_kg)
summary(data_2$height_m)
summary(data_2$hb_gdl)
summary(data_2$facilities_visited_prior)
summary(data_2$date_of_surgery)
```

```{r}
data_2 <- data_2 %>%
  mutate(
    age_cat = case_when(
      age < 1 ~ "<1",
      age < 5 ~ "1–4",
      age < 15 ~ "5–14",
      age < 45 ~ "15–44",
      age < 65 ~ "45–64",
      age >= 65 ~ "65+",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ) %>% factor(levels = c("<1","1–4","5–14","15–44","45–64","65+"))
  )

data_2 <- data_2 %>%
  mutate(
    bmi = weight_kg / (height_m^2),
    
    bmi_cat = case_when(
      bmi < 18.5 ~ "Underweight",
      bmi < 25 ~ "Normal",
      bmi < 30 ~ "Overweight",
      bmi >= 30 ~ "Obese",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ) %>% factor(levels = c("Underweight","Normal","Overweight","Obese"))
  )

data_2 <- data_2 %>%
  mutate(
    hb_cat = case_when(
      hb_gdl < 7 ~ "Severe",
      hb_gdl < 10 ~ "Moderate",
      hb_gdl < 12 ~ "Mild",
      hb_gdl >= 12 ~ "Normal",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ) %>% factor(levels = c("Normal","Mild","Moderate","Severe"))
  )

data_2 <- data_2 %>%
  mutate(
    facilities_cat = case_when(
      facilities_visited_prior == 0 ~ "0",
      facilities_visited_prior == 1 ~ "1",
      facilities_visited_prior >= 2 ~ "2+",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ) %>% factor(levels = c("0","1","2+"))
  )

table(data_2$age_cat, useNA = "ifany")
table(data_2$bmi_cat, useNA = "ifany")
table(data_2$hb_cat, useNA = "ifany")
table(data_2$facilities_cat, useNA = "ifany")
```

```{r}
cat_vars <- data_2 %>%
  dplyr::select(where(is.factor)) %>%
  dplyr::select(-dplyr::any_of(c("age_cat", "bmi_cat", "hb_cat", "facilities_cat")))

purrr::map(cat_vars, ~ table(.x, useNA = "ifany"))

write.csv(cat_vars, file.path(data_dir, "processed", "cat_var_summary.csv"), row.names = TRUE)

#type of surgery grouping
data_2 <- data_2 %>%
  mutate(
    procedure_group = coalesce(
      type_of_surgery_adults,
      types_of_surgery_paediatrics
    ) %>% as.factor()
  )

data_2 <- data_2 %>%
  mutate(
    procedure_name = coalesce(
      type_of_surgery_performed_adult,
      type_of_surgery_performed_paedia
    )
  )

data_2 <- data_2 %>%
  mutate(
    procedure_name = fct_lump_n(procedure_name, n = 10)
  )

table(data_2$procedure_name, useNA = "ifany")

# urgency
data_2 <- data_2 %>%
  mutate(
    urgency_cat = case_when(
      str_detect(str_to_lower(urgency_of_operation), "elect") ~ "Elective",
      str_detect(str_to_lower(urgency_of_operation), "emerg") ~ "Emergency",
      str_detect(str_to_lower(urgency_of_operation), "urgent") ~ "Urgent",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ) %>% factor(levels = c("Elective","Urgent","Emergency","Other"))
  )

table(data_2$urgency_cat, useNA = "ifany")

#asa score
data_2 <- data_2 %>%
  mutate(
    asa = as.numeric(asa_physical_status_score),
    asa_cat = factor(asa, ordered = TRUE)
  )

data_2 <- data_2 %>%
  mutate(
    asa_cat = case_when(
      asa == 1 ~ "ASA I",
      asa == 2 ~ "ASA II",
      asa == 3 ~ "ASA III",
      asa == 4 ~ "ASA IV",
      asa == 5 ~ "ASA V",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ) %>% factor(levels = c("ASA I","ASA II","ASA III","ASA IV","ASA V"))
  )

table(data_2$asa_cat, useNA = "ifany")

#prophylctic antibiotic
data_2 <- data_2 %>%
  mutate(
    abx_given = case_when(
      str_detect(str_to_lower(as.character(prophylactic_antibiotics_given)), "yes") ~ "Yes",
      str_detect(str_to_lower(as.character(prophylactic_antibiotics_given)), "no") ~ "No",
      str_detect(str_to_lower(as.character(prophylactic_antibiotics_given)), "not indicated") ~ NA_character_,
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    abx_given = factor(
      abx_given,
      levels = c("No", "Yes")
    ),
    
    abx_timing_cat = case_when(
      is.na(timing_of_p_antibiotic) ~ NA_character_,
      str_detect(str_to_lower(as.character(timing_of_p_antibiotic)), "not indicated") ~ NA_character_,
      str_detect(str_to_lower(as.character(timing_of_p_antibiotic)), "1-2 hours before surgical incision") ~ "1-2 hours before",
      str_detect(str_to_lower(as.character(timing_of_p_antibiotic)), "2-3 hours before surgical incision") ~ "2-3 hours before",
      str_detect(str_to_lower(as.character(timing_of_p_antibiotic)), "3-4 hours before surgical incision") ~ "3-4 hours before",
      str_detect(str_to_lower(as.character(timing_of_p_antibiotic)), "4-5 hours before surgical incision") ~ "4-5 hours before",
      str_detect(str_to_lower(as.character(timing_of_p_antibiotic)), "30-60 minutes before surgical incision") ~ "30-60 minutes before",
      TRUE ~ "Unknown"
    ),
    
    abx_timing_cat = factor(
      abx_timing_cat,
      levels = c(
        "30-60 minutes before",
        "1-2 hours before",
        "2-3 hours before",
        "3-4 hours before",
        "4-5 hours before",
        "Unknown"
      )
    )
  )

table(data_2$abx_given, useNA = "ifany")
table(data_2$abx_timing_cat, useNA = "ifany")

#wound class
data_2 <- data_2 %>%
  mutate(
    wound_class_cat = case_when(
      str_detect(str_to_lower(as.character(wound_class)), "^class i\\b") ~ "Class I: Clean",
      str_detect(str_to_lower(as.character(wound_class)), "^class ii\\b") ~ "Class II: Clean-contaminated",
      str_detect(str_to_lower(as.character(wound_class)), "^class iii\\b") ~ "Class III: Contaminated",
      str_detect(str_to_lower(as.character(wound_class)), "^class iv\\b") ~ "Class IV: Dirty-infected",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    wound_class_cat = factor(
      wound_class_cat,
      levels = c(
        "Class I: Clean",
        "Class II: Clean-contaminated",
        "Class III: Contaminated",
        "Class IV: Dirty-infected"
      ),
      ordered = TRUE
    )
  )

table(data_2$wound_class_cat, useNA = "ifany")

data_2 <- data_2 %>%
  mutate(
    wound_contaminated = case_when(
      wound_class_cat %in% c("Class I: Clean", "Class II: Clean-contaminated") ~ "Clean/clean-contaminated",
      wound_class_cat %in% c("Class III: Contaminated", "Class IV: Dirty-infected") ~ "Contaminated/dirty",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ) %>%
      factor(levels = c("Clean/clean-contaminated", "Contaminated/dirty"))
  )

table(data_2$wound_contaminated, useNA = "ifany")

#clavien_dindo
data_2 <- data_2 %>%
  mutate(
    clavien_clean = stringr::str_to_upper(
      stringr::str_squish(as.character(clavien_dindo_classification))
    ),

    clavien_grade = case_when(
      str_detect(clavien_clean, "GRADE IIIA") ~ "IIIa",
      str_detect(clavien_clean, "GRADE IIIB") ~ "IIIb",
      str_detect(clavien_clean, "GRADE IVA") ~ "IVa",
      str_detect(clavien_clean, "GRADE IVB") ~ "IVb",
      str_detect(clavien_clean, "GRADE II\\b") ~ "II",
      str_detect(clavien_clean, "GRADE I\\b") ~ "I",
      str_detect(clavien_clean, "GRADE III\\b") ~ "III",
      str_detect(clavien_clean, "GRADE IV\\b") ~ "IV",
      str_detect(clavien_clean, "GRADE V") ~ "V",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),

    clavien_grade = factor(
      clavien_grade,
      levels = c("I", "II", "III", "IIIa", "IIIb", "IV", "IVa", "IVb", "V"),
      ordered = TRUE
    )
  )


data_2 <- data_2 %>%
  mutate(
    clavien_group = case_when(
      clavien_grade %in% c("I","II") ~ "Minor",
      clavien_grade %in% c("III","IIIa","IIIb","IV","IVa","IVb") ~ "Major",
      clavien_grade == "V" ~ "Death",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ) %>%
      factor(levels = c("Minor","Major","Death"))
  )

table(data_2$clavien_grade, useNA = "ifany")
table(data_2$clavien_group, useNA = "ifany")

#surgical infection
data_2 <- data_2 %>%
  mutate(
    ssi = case_when(
      str_detect(str_to_lower(post_surg_infection), "yes") ~ 1,
      str_detect(str_to_lower(post_surg_infection), "no") ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    ssi = factor(
      ssi,
      levels = c(0, 1),
      labels = c("No", "Yes")
    )
  )

table(data_2$ssi, useNA = "ifany")

#Mortality
data_2 <- data_2 %>%
  mutate(
    death_30d = case_when(
      str_detect(str_to_lower(alive_at_30_days), "alive") ~ 0,
      str_detect(str_to_lower(alive_at_30_days), "dead|died") ~ 1,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    death_30d = factor(
      death_30d,
      levels = c(0, 1),
      labels = c("Alive", "Dead")
    )
    
  )

table(data_2$death_30d, useNA = "ifany")

#cause of death
data_2 <- data_2 %>%
  mutate(cause_of_death_cat = case_when(
    str_detect(str_to_lower(as.character(cause_of_death)), "multiorgan failure") ~ "Multiorgan failure",
    str_detect(str_to_lower(as.character(cause_of_death)), "sepsis") ~ "Sepsis",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  ) %>%
    factor(levels = c("Multiorgan failure", "Sepsis"))
  )

table(data_2$cause_of_death_cat, useNA = "ifany")

# Return to theatre
data_2 <- data_2 %>%
  mutate(
    reoperation_30d = case_when(
      str_detect(str_to_lower(return_to_theatre), "yes") ~ 1,
      str_detect(str_to_lower(return_to_theatre), "no") ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    reoperation_30d = factor(
      reoperation_30d,
      levels = c(0, 1),
      labels = c("No", "Yes")
    )
  )

table(data_2$reoperation_30d, useNA = "ifany")

#functionaity
data_2 <- data_2 %>%
  mutate(
    functional_status = case_when(
      str_detect(str_to_lower(self_care_activities), "independent") ~ "Independent",
      str_detect(str_to_lower(self_care_activities), "needs assistance") ~ "Dependent",
      str_detect(str_to_lower(self_care_activities), "not able to do") ~ "Dependent",
      TRUE ~ "Unknown"
    ) %>% factor()
  )

table(data_2$functional_status, useNA = "ifany")

```

```{r}
tbl_casemix_site <- data_2 %>%
  dplyr::select(site, age, age_cat, sex, bmi, bmi_cat, hb_gdl, hb_cat, facilities_cat, asa_cat) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = site,
    missing = "ifany",
    statistic = list(
      all_continuous() ~ "{median} ({p25}, {p75})",
      all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"
    ),
    digits = all_continuous() ~ 1
  ) %>%
  add_overall() %>%
  bold_labels()

tbl_surgical_site <- data_2 %>%
  dplyr::select(site, procedure_group, procedure_name, urgency_cat,
         wound_class_cat, wound_contaminated,
         abx_given, abx_timing_cat, preoperative_fasting,
         surgical_field_preparation, intraoperative_antibiotics,
         intra_oper_transfussion, minimal_invasive_procd_used,
         anaesthesia_type) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = site,
    type = list(abx_given ~ "categorical"),
    missing = "ifany",
    statistic = list(
      all_continuous() ~ "{median} ({p25}, {p75})",
      all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"
    ),
    digits = all_continuous() ~ 1
  ) %>%
  add_overall() %>%
  bold_labels()

tbl_outcomes_site <- data_2 %>%
  dplyr::select(site, clavien_grade, clavien_group,
         complication_severity_grading, ssi,
         if_yes_which_type_of_ssi, death_30d,
         cause_of_death_cat, reoperation_30d,
         functional_status) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = site,
    type = list(
      ssi ~ "categorical",
      death_30d ~ "categorical",
      reoperation_30d ~ "categorical"
    ),
    missing = "ifany",
    statistic = list(all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)")
  ) %>%
  add_overall() %>%
  bold_labels()

tbl_big_site <- tbl_stack(
  tbls = list(tbl_casemix_site, tbl_surgical_site, tbl_outcomes_site),
  group_header = c(
    "Patient case-mix",
    "Surgical and perioperative profile",
    "Postoperative and 30-day outcomes"
  )
)

tbl_big_site

as_flex_table(tbl_big_site) %>%
  flextable::save_as_docx(
    path = file.path(root_dir, "outputs", "preliminary_summary_by_site.docx")
  )
```
